name: The Back Nine Golf | Livonia, MI
about: The Back Nine Golf in Livonia is an indoor entertainment venue that combines golf simulation with a social atmosphere. It provides a comfortable environment for players of all skill levels to enjoy the game year-round, regardless of weather conditions. The facility focuses on offering a modern golf experience, likely featuring multiple simulator bays suitable for both practice and play. The venue caters to golfers looking for a casual outing as well as those seeking to improve their game through data-driven feedback. It serves as a destination for friends, families, and groups to gather for a unique sport and leisure activity. The location in Livonia makes it accessible for local residents looking for a convenient indoor golf option. The venue operates as a premium entertainment experience where golf meets social interaction.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service expected for this venue type

simulator_hardware.notes: Specific hardware details not available on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended, venues typically offer rental clubs for guests who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are generally not permitted as the venue offers a full menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the software used.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, indoor golf venues are generally family-friendly and welcome children, making it a great activity for the whole family.
